title: epiphyllum hookeri subsp. columbiense
intro: Epiphyllum hookeri subsp. columbiense is a rare, epiphytic cactus species native to Colombia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, while also promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Epiphyllum hookeri subsp. columbiense are typically made from the plant's leaves and stems, which are dried and then used to make teas or infusions.
